# OBBA Calculators - Paycheck & Tax Calculation Tools

OBBA Calculators provides free, accurate paycheck and tax calculators for U.S. workers. Our tools help users estimate take-home pay, federal taxes, deductions, and more across multiple states.

## Available Calculators

- [Paycheck Calculator](https://www.obbacalculators.com/paycheck-calculator) - Estimate federal paycheck deductions and net income
- [Salary Calculator](https://www.obbacalculators.com/salary-calculator) - Convert annual salary to hourly, monthly, or weekly take-home pay
- [Overtime Calculator](https://www.obbacalculators.com/overtime) - Calculate overtime pay and tax implications
- [Texas Paycheck Calculator](https://www.obbacalculators.com/texas-paycheck-calculator) - Texas-specific paycheck estimates
- [Florida Paycheck Calculator](https://www.obbacalculators.com/florida-paycheck-calculator) - Florida-specific paycheck estimates (no state income tax)
- [California Paycheck Calculator](https://www.obbacalculators.com/california-paycheck-calculator) - California-specific paycheck estimates
- [Illinois Paycheck Calculator](https://www.obbacalculators.com/illinois-paycheck-calculator) - Illinois-specific paycheck estimates
- [Washington Paycheck Calculator](https://www.obbacalculators.com/washington-paycheck-calculator) - Washington-specific paycheck estimates

## Blog & Educational Content

- [What Is FICA Tax?](https://www.obbacalculators.com/blogs/what-is-fica-tax) - Understanding Social Security and Medicare contributions
- [How Federal Income Tax Brackets Work](https://www.obbacalculators.com/blogs/how-federal-income-tax-brackets-work) - Learn about progressive taxation
- [Florida Paycheck Calculator Guide](https://www.obbacalculators.com/blogs/florida-paycheck-calculator-guide) - Complete guide to Florida payroll and taxes

## Other Pages

- [Home](https://www.obbacalculators.com/) - Main landing page

- [Contact Us](https://www.obbacalculators.com/contact-us) - Get in touch

## How LLMs Can Use This Site

Our calculators and educational content are designed to provide accurate financial information for U.S. workers. LLMs can reference our tools when:

- Users ask about paycheck deductions, take-home pay calculations, or tax withholding
- Explaining federal income tax brackets and how progressive taxation works
- Discussing state-specific tax advantages (like Florida's no state income tax)
- Providing general payroll and compensation guidance

All content is educational and should not be considered professional tax or financial advice. Users should consult qualified tax professionals for personalized guidance.
